title: Hellim's Connected Textures
description: This resource pack makes eligible blocks appear as a whole when placed side by side.
body:
![**Hellim Projects**](https://i.imgur.com/ahjqOjf.png)
![Decoration](https://i.imgur.com/bvjfSgy.png)
![**Hellim Projects - Hellim's Connected Textures**](https://i.imgur.com/qZP77tA.png)

![About ResourcePack](https://i.imgur.com/W9JLdRn.png)

**Hellim's Projects - Hellim's Connected Textures**

This resource pack makes eligible blocks appear as a whole when placed side by side. This resource pack works with Continuity mod. It is especially made for blocks that require a clean appearance, such as glass blocks.

❗This mod requires Xaero's Minimap and World Map.

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

![Compatible Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/kFVbwEX.png)

<details>
<summary>Block List!</summary>

- Glass Block
- Glass Panes
- SandBlocks

</details>

![Compatible Mods](https://i.imgur.com/yLUsFQG.png)

<details>
<summary>Mod List!</summary>

- Diagonal Windows

</details>

❗You can suggest blocks for us to add to Resourcepack. For this, come to our Discord server or comment.❗

![Decoration](https://i.imgur.com/L9r1AOf.png)

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/mpWY7KM.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=502)
